header.label: MY EXPERIENCE
header.description:
A collection of roles, responsibilities and initiatives
that shaped my journey and strengthened my skills.

roles.title: General Secretary
roles.description: Leading a team of 20+ students, organizing technical events, workshops and hackathons to build a strong tech community.

roles.title: Event Head
roles.description: Managed a team and executed flagship events, bringing together 1000+ participants across various domains.

roles.title: Class Representative
roles.description: Represented the class, bridged communication between students and faculty, and contributed to academic initiatives.

items.title: Consistent Leadership
items.description: Took initiative and led teams to deliver impactful results.

items.title: Community Builder
items.description: Built platforms and communities that encourage learning and collaboration.

items.title: Problem Solver
items.description: Find creative solutions and implement ideas that create real impact.

quote.text: Great leaders don't set out to be a leader, they set out to make a difference.
quote.author: J. Maxwell
